creator: drsweetlips@gmail.com
text:
Well as from what I can tell the wifi card does  associate, but shortly
there after the device hangis and the kernel resets it. So when the device
hangs, I cannot do "dhclient wlan0" to get the IP as the device as been
reset (and simultaneously disassociated from AP). Maintainer has been
paged/contacted in addition to this PR.

---
Proud N00b
